companies.name: OpenAI
companies.summary:
[Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of Input; OpenAI assigns ownership of Output to users.  
[AI Usage]: Users must not use Output for significant decisions or to develop competing models.  
[Liability]: OpenAI disclaims responsibility for inaccuracies in Output; users must verify accuracy independently.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain rights to Inputs; Anthropic may use Materials for service improvement and model training. [AI Usage]: Outputs may contain inaccuracies; independent verification is required. [Liability]: Users are responsible for all account activity and compliance with laws.

companies.name: Midjourney
companies.summary: [AI Usage]: User-generated images used to improve AI models without opt-out. [Data Rights]: Personal and billing info collected.

companies.name: Google
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain rights to their content; Google maintains intellectual property rights. [AI Usage]: AI and machine learning are utilized for service improvement. [Liability]: Users must comply with terms; violations may result in service restrictions.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of their content but grant Microsoft a royalty-free license for service provision. [AI Usage]: Users must comply with conduct rules when using AI services. [Liability]: Microsoft is not responsible for user-generated content.

companies.name: Meta
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data used for personalized ads; no sale of personal data without permission. [AI Usage]: Advanced technologies like AI employed for safety and service improvement. [Liability]: Meta may take action against harmful conduct; users assume risk of content shared.

companies.name: X (Twitter)
companies.summary:
[Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of their Content, granting X a broad, royalty-free license.  
[AI Usage]: Users must comply with acceptable use terms; scraping is prohibited.  
[Liability]: Services provided "AS IS"; liability limited to $100 or amount paid in last six months.

companies.name: TikTok
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive data collection including device settings and activity. [AI Usage]: Data used for personalization; may be transferred internationally.

companies.name: LinkedIn
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data shared with Microsoft and affiliates. [Liability]: Disputes resolved via mandatory arbitration; class action rights waived.

companies.name: Instagram
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User content remains owned by users; Instagram has a license to use it. [AI Usage]: AI tools may analyze user content. [Liability]: Instagram limits liability for user-generated content.

companies.name: Pinterest
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain rights to their content but must comply with Pinterest's policies. [AI Usage]: Pinterest uses personal data to personalize content. [Liability]: Pinterest may remove content and suspend accounts for policy violations.

companies.name: Reddit
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users consent to data collection per Privacy Policy. [AI Usage]: Content licensed for AI training; arbitration required for disputes.

companies.name: Discord
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive data collection includes monitoring active apps and games. [Liability]: Class action rights waived via arbitration clause.

companies.name: Slack
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Data ownership for platform content is ambiguous. [Liability]: Business data governed by customer agreements; arbitration required.

companies.name: Zoom
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users must provide accurate information; Zoom has no liability for inaccuracies. [AI Usage]: No specific terms on AI usage mentioned. [Liability]: Users waive rights to recover certain damages from Zoom.

companies.name: Notion
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive personal info and usage data collected. [Liability]: Data deletion requests subject to retention policy timelines.

companies.name: Dropbox
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Dropbox scans user files for OCR and personalization features. [Liability]: Limited liability for data loss or unauthorized access.

companies.name: Asana
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of submitted content; Asana obtains a license for service provision. [AI Usage]: Users must implement oversight and evaluate AI outputs. [Liability]: Asana disclaims all warranties; no liability for service disruptions.

companies.name: GitHub
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users own content but GitHub holds broad usage rights. [AI Usage]: Public repositories may be used to train AI.

companies.name: Amazon
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for service improvement. [AI Usage]: AI tools may analyze user data. [Liability]: Company limits liability for data misuse.

companies.name: Walmart
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users can request personal information; options to opt-out of data sales available. [AI Usage]: Not specified. [Liability]: Walmart disclaims liability for third-party actions.

companies.name: Shopify
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of their materials but grant Shopify a license to use them. [AI Usage]: Shopify may use AI tools for service enhancement. [Liability]: Shopify is not liable for account security breaches.

companies.name: Netflix
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal information not sold or shared. [AI Usage]: No specific AI usage terms provided. [Liability]: No liability clauses mentioned.

companies.name: Disney+
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive viewing habits and device data collected. [Liability]: Parental controls required for accounts linked to minors.

companies.name: Spotify
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Listening data used for personalization and recommendations. [Liability]: Mandatory arbitration waives class action rights for users.

companies.name: Twitch
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Data collection practices referenced but not detailed in terms. [AI Usage]: Streamed content may be archived and reused by Twitch.

companies.name: YouTube
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Content processed per YouTube Data Processing Terms. [AI Usage]: AI training use governed by separate terms not listed here.

companies.name: Hulu
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data shared with third-party advertisers. [Liability]: Users cannot fully opt out of third-party data sharing.

companies.name: Max
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Scope of personal data collection unclear in terms. [Liability]: Subscription cancellation may not immediately halt all data use.

companies.name: Uber
companies.summary:
[Data Rights]: User recordings are owned by Uber; not considered User Content.  
[AI Usage]: No commercial use or AI training without Uber's permission.  
[Liability]: Uber assumes no liability for account access loss or service interruptions.

companies.name: Airbnb
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Personal data collection and usage governed by Privacy Policy. [AI Usage]: Airbnb utilizes AI for search relevance and pricing. [Liability]: Limited liability for Airbnb; indemnification required from users.

companies.name: DoorDash
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for AI training. [Liability]: Company not liable for data misuse or service interruptions. [Critical User Constraint]: Users must consent to data usage.

companies.name: Lyft
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Lyft collects user information, including personal, location, and device data. [AI Usage]: AI may be used for processing collected data. [Liability]: Users assume responsibility for content shared.

companies.name: Grubhub
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for service improvement. [AI Usage]: No specific AI usage terms provided. [Liability]: Grubhub not liable for Merchant or Delivery Partner actions. [Critical User Constraint]: Users must be 16+ or have guardian consent.

companies.name: TaskRabbit
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users' personal data usage governed by Global Privacy Policy. [AI Usage]: No explicit mention of AI usage. [Liability]: Taskrabbit not liable for Tasker actions or classifications.

companies.name: JPMorgan Chase
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User information may be disclosed to affiliates and third parties; consent required for data transfer. [AI Usage]: Monitoring and tracking of user interactions permitted. [Liability]: Users indemnify JPMorgan Chase for unauthorized access and data breaches.

companies.name: PayPal
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Users retain ownership of their data but grant PayPal a license to use it for service improvement. [AI Usage]: AI tools may be used for transaction analysis. [Liability]: Users remain liable for obligations post-account closure.

companies.name: Stripe
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Data collection scope unclear for business users. [Liability]: Merchants responsible for customer data compliance obligations.

companies.name: Venmo
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Extensive personal and financial data collected. [Liability]: Social transaction history publicly visible by default.

companies.name: Robinhood
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Limited clarity on investment data collection practices. [Liability]: Disputes resolved via mandatory arbitration; limited legal recourse.

companies.name: Coinbase
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: Transaction data used for compliance and analytics. [Liability]: Arbitration waives class action and jury trial rights.

companies.name: Tesla
companies.summary: [Data Rights]: User data may be collected and used for service improvement. [AI Usage]: AI tools may analyze user interactions. [Liability]: Company limits liability for indirect damages.
